title: AISecIncidents-2025-26: A Dataset of AI Security Incidents with EU AI Act Compliance Mapping
description: A dataset of 55 AI security incidents spanning January 2025–April 2026, of which 12 are verified through multi-source public confirmation. Includes systematic static analysis of Claude Code v2.1.88 (1,332 TypeScript files), discovery of 23 AST-based security checks, the Semantic Desync vulnerability class, and UNDERCOVER MODE (57,000-word hidden instruction set). Mapped to EU AI Act compliance requirements (Articles 9, 13, 15). Includes multi-label classification benchmark aisec-euaiact-v1.0 with n=12 ground-truth labels.
